content: Update server.py: mount auth_v2 and admin_users routers + init_audit_logger on startup
Bridge legacy auth compatibility: update get_current_user to handle both token formats & id/_id
Fix require_role decorator: case-insensitive role match + flexible user kwarg detection
Create MongoDB indexes for new B2B/vendor fields (sparse unique)
Backend smoke test via curl: B2B register → pending login blocked → admin approve → login works
[Phase 1C] Build B2B registration form page (company + GST + PAN + address + contact)
[Phase 1C] Build Vendor registration form page (business + bank + identity)
[Phase 1C] Build Admin approval UI: pending B2B users + vendors queues with approve/reject
[Phase 1C] Update frontend AuthContext to handle new roles & PENDING/REJECTED error states
Comprehensive frontend+backend test via testing_agent for Phase 1 slice
